raw_cv_text:
Iris Thijs
+44 7911 523 847 | Email: iris.thijs@outlook.com | LinkedIn: iris-thijs | GitHub: IrisThijs | https://iris-thijs.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | Master of Engineering in Computer Science 2013 - 2017
Achieved First Class Honours with distinction; authored thesis on distributed consensus algorithms adopted by 3
academic institutions
Led college programming society with 200+ members, organizing 12 annual coding competitions and workshops
ETH Zurich | Exchange Programme - Advanced Systems Design 2015 - 2016
Completed specialized coursework in microservices architecture and concurrent systems programming
Collaborated on research project that resulted in 1 peer-reviewed publication in distributed computing journal
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Staff Backend Engineer 2022 - Present
Architected and led migration of core payment processing service from monolith to event-driven microservices, reducing
latency by 34% and enabling 8 new revenue streams generating $2.1M annually
Designed payment reconciliation system processing 150M+ transactions daily; achieved 99.99% accuracy and reduced
financial discrepancies by 87%
Mentored 6 senior engineers and established backend engineering practices adopted across 40-person team, improving
code review turnaround by 42%
Datadog | Senior Staff Backend Engineer 2019 - 2022
Engineered high-throughput metrics aggregation pipeline handling 5.2 trillion data points/month; optimized storage
utilization by 56% saving $3.8M annually
Led incident response infrastructure overhaul; introduced distributed tracing for 600+ microservices, reducing mean time
to resolution by 63%
Built and open-sourced Lua-based service mesh configuration framework adopted by 12+ companies; garnered 2.4K
GitHub stars
Cloudflare | Senior Backend Engineer 2017 - 2019
Optimized DNS query resolution engine using Rust, reducing query latency from 145ms to 18ms (87.6% improvement)
across 200+ data centers globally
Developed distributed rate-limiting system protecting 8 million domains from DDoS attacks; prevented $47M in potential
customer outages
Established performance benchmarking framework that identified 23 critical bottlenecks in authentication services,
collectively improving throughput by 2.9x
Shopify | Backend Engineer 2015 - 2017
Built order fulfillment microservice handling 12M+ orders monthly; implemented caching strategy reducing database
load by 71%
Designed and deployed payment gateway abstraction layer supporting 7 new payment providers, increasing merchant
conversion by 18%
PROJECTS
Kronos - Distributed Task Scheduler | Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kubernetes 2021 - 2023
Architected fault-tolerant distributed task scheduler supporting 500K concurrent jobs with 99.95% reliability; reduced
scheduling latency by 73% compared to existing solutions
Implemented adaptive backpressure mechanism automatically scaling across 8 Kubernetes clusters; decreased resource
utilization by 42% while maintaining SLA guarantees
VectorFlow - ML Training Data Pipeline | Python, Apache Spark, Kafka, BigQuery 2020 - 2021
Created streaming data pipeline processing 280K events/second for ML feature generation; achieved 99.7% data
completeness and reduced pipeline errors by 89%
Implemented intelligent partitioning algorithm reducing training data shuffle time by 64%, enabling 4.2x faster model
iteration cycles
EXTRACURRICULAR
Backend Architecture Summit | Conference Speaker & Track Organizer 2021 - Present
Delivered keynote on scaling distributed systems to 1,200+ engineers; presentation ranked #2 most impactful with 94%
positive feedback rating
Organized distributed systems track featuring 18 sessions; curated talks that drove 34% increase in conference attendance
year-over-year
CNCF Mentorship Program | Mentor 2020 - Present
Mentored 8 junior engineers in Kubernetes and cloud-native development; 6 protégés secured positions at tier-1 tech
companies within 12 months
Created comprehensive backend system design curriculum adopted by 3 universities in open-source education initiative
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, Rust, Java, TypeScript, SQL
Technologies – gRPC, GraphQL, Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Kubernetes, Docker, Apache Spark,
Protocol Buffers, Pub/Sub systems
Tools – Git, GitHub, CI/CD (GitHub Actions, CircleCI), DataDog, Prometheus, ELK Stack, Terraform, AWS, GCP
